title: SiTime Q2 2022 Earnings - Record Revenue and Highest ASPs
text: SiTime delivered record revenues of $79.4 million, non-GAAP gross margin of 66.7% and non-GAAP EPS of $1.11, all exceeding their previous guidance. This was their 11th consecutive quarter to exceed guidance. In Q2, the company achieved the highest ASPs (Average Selling Prices) in the history of the company, 30% higher year-on-year and 10% higher quarter on quarter, which came from the role of greater precision timing products in their revenue. Their comms enterprise business was a standout, growing 16% over Q1 and was the segment with the highest growth rate. The company generated $15.3 million in positive cash flow from operations and invested $9.6 million in equipment. However, the current macroeconomic environment was impacting sales of some of their products and especially their lower-end products.
